news.t: Swedish property woes deepen as SBB shares plunge to 5-year low
3 Inverse ETFs to Short Small Cap Stocks

overview.description: The ProShares Short SmallCap600 (SBB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 index. The fund provides inverse exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of 600 US small-cap companies. SBB was launched on Jan 23, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Swedish property woes deepen as SBB shares plunge to 5-year low
data.text: Shares in Swedish property company SBB SE:SBB.B have plunged to a five-year low after it was forced to abandoned plans to bolster its finances.

data.title: 3 Inverse ETFs to Short Small Cap Stocks
data.text: Three inverse ETFs to short small cap stocks are MYY, SBB, and RWM.
